name: Endor Labs
description: Endor Labs software supply chain security platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Endor Labs
2. Go to Settings > API Keys
3. Click Create API Key, copy both the Key and Secret
4. Enter your namespace (organization identifier) and paste the key and secret below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Endor Labs > Settings > API Keys > Create API key. Copy the Key value.

credentialFields.label: API Secret
credentialFields.helpText: The secret value shown when you create the API key (shown once).

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Verifies Endor Labs has projects connected for supply chain security
